chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-120 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 26-09-2025 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General. -------- None present for the respondents. Statement has been filed by the respondent No.3 SSP and respondent No.1 SHO police station Kashmore, wherein they have under taken to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and submits that the lives of petitioners are at stake, therefore, appropriate directions may be issued to respondent No.1 to 04 for further protection. It is an obligation upon the police to provide protection to the individuals without fear. It is expected that the respondents will conduct themselves in accordance with law and shall provide protection to the petitioners and ensure that no harassment is caused to them. Petition is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
